# LibreAgent public API snapshot
# Generated by ci/scripts/abi-snapshot.sh
# Format: one demangled T-binding symbol per line, sorted; section
# header line '== <archive basename> =='.
# Re-generate with: ci/scripts/abi-snapshot.sh --update <build_dir>
# Diff a fresh build against this baseline with: ci/scripts/abi-snapshot.sh --check
#
# Surface: T-binding symbols of the static archive libLibreAgentCore.a,
# filtered to the public LibreSCRS::Agent:: namespace. A static archive
# also carries internal TU-level helpers as T-binding symbols; only the
# public namespace is frozen, so only it is snapshotted.

== libLibreAgentCore.a ==
